name: Freshdesk
description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support and helpdesk platform by Freshworks. The API lets you manage support tickets, contacts, companies, and knowledge base articles. It supports multi-channel ticketing from email, phone, chat, and social media in a single unified inbox.

capabilities.name: tickets_list
capabilities.description: List all support tickets with filtering by requester, status, or priority.

capabilities.name: tickets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific ticket by ID with all details and conversations.

capabilities.name: tickets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new support ticket with subject, description, and priority.

capabilities.name: tickets_update
capabilities.description: Update a ticket's status, priority, assignee, or custom fields.

capabilities.name: tickets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a ticket permanently by ID.

capabilities.name: tickets_search
capabilities.description: Search tickets using field-based query filters.

capabilities.name: tickets_reply
capabilities.description: Send a public reply to a customer on an existing ticket.

capabilities.name: tickets_note_create
capabilities.description: Add a private or public note to a ticket for agent collaboration.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts with filtering by email, phone, or company.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific contact by ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with name, email, and company association.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update a contact's details.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact permanently by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_list
capabilities.description: List all companies in your Freshdesk account.

capabilities.name: companies_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific company by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_create
capabilities.description: Create a new company with name and domain.

capabilities.name: companies_update
capabilities.description: Update a company's details.

capabilities.name: agents_list
capabilities.description: List all agents with their roles and availability.

capabilities.name: agents_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific agent by ID.

capabilities.name: groups_list
capabilities.description: List all agent groups in the helpdesk.

capabilities.name: solutions_categories_list
capabilities.description: List all knowledge base categories.

capabilities.name: solutions_folders_list
capabilities.description: List all folders within a knowledge base category.

capabilities.name: solutions_articles_list
capabilities.description: List all articles in a knowledge base folder.

capabilities.name: solutions_articles_create
capabilities.description: Create a new knowledge base article.

capabilities.name: time_entries_list
capabilities.description: List all time entries logged against a ticket.

capabilities.name: time_entries_create
capabilities.description: Log a time entry against a ticket.

capabilities.name: satisfaction_ratings_list
capabilities.description: List customer satisfaction ratings for a ticket.
